phases.name: Core Flow Completeness
phases.success_criteria: Booking -> session -> follow-up works end-to-end in demo-safe mode.

phases.name: Therapist + Patient Systems
phases.success_criteria: Therapist and patient daily workflows are usable and testable.

phases.name: Communication + Engagement
phases.success_criteria: Patients receive reminders and engagement actions between sessions.

phases.name: Admin + Billing + Growth
phases.success_criteria: Operational controls and growth metrics available for clinic admin.

phases.name: Marketplace + Extensibility
phases.success_criteria: Module/plugin lifecycle and licensing controls are enforceable.
